_doc: Pretraining token counts for the 7 models used in the multilingual LME analysis. Values are in trillions (T = 1e12). 'source' cites where the number was reported. 'imputed' = true when the value is not publicly disclosed and a best-guess is used; the LME pipeline runs a sensitivity analysis dropping these rows.

Qwen/Qwen2.5-3B.source: Qwen2.5 Technical Report (arXiv:2412.15115): pretraining data scaled to 18T tokens for the family.

meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B.source: The Llama 3 Herd of Models (arXiv:2407.21783): ~15T tokens across the 8B/70B/405B family.

microsoft/phi-4.source: Phi-4 Technical Report (arXiv:2412.08905): ~9.8T tokens of curated and synthetic data.

google/gemma-2-9b.source: Gemma 2 Technical Report (arXiv:2408.00118), Table on training data: 8T tokens for the 9B model.

mistralai/Mistral-7B-v0.3.source: Not publicly disclosed; imputed at 8T (consistent with contemporaneous open-7B models). Sensitivity analysis re-runs LME with this row removed.
